business-savings.title: Business Savings Account
business-savings.subtitle: Earn competitive interest on your business reserves. FDIC insured. Easy transfers between your checking and savings accounts.

features.title: Competitive Rate
features.desc: 3.50% APY on all balances. Interest compounded daily, paid monthly.

features.title: Easy Transfers
features.desc: Move money between checking and savings instantly in the app.

features.title: FDIC Insured
features.desc: Your deposits are protected up to $250,000 per depositor.

business-savings.cta_title: Put your idle cash to work
business-savings.cta_desc: Open a Business Savings account and start earning 3.50% APY.

cash-back-card.title: Business Cash Rewards Visa®
cash-back-card.subtitle: Earn 2% cash back on the top 3 categories your business spends in most. Plus 1% on everything else. No annual fee.

features.title: Auto-Category Optimization
features.desc: We automatically identify your top 3 spending categories and apply 2% cash back.

features.title: Free Employee Cards
features.desc: Issue cards to employees. Set individual spending limits and controls.

features.title: Expense Management
features.desc: Categorize transactions, download reports, and integrate with accounting software.

features.title: No Foreign Txn Fees
features.desc: Use your card internationally with no added fees.

features.title: Fraud Protection
features.desc: Zero liability on unauthorized charges. Real-time transaction alerts.

features.title: Year-End Summary
features.desc: Detailed annual spending summary for tax preparation.

cash-back-card.cta_desc: Apply online. Instant decision in most cases.

compare-accounts.title: Compare business accounts
compare-accounts.subtitle: Find the right account for your business size and needs.
compare-accounts.cta_desc: Talk to a business banking specialist for personalized guidance.

essential-checking.title: Business Essential Checking
essential-checking.subtitle: Low-cost checking designed for small businesses and startups. No minimum balance required. 200 free transactions per month.

features.title: Business Debit Card
features.desc: Visa® debit for everyday business purchases with fraud protection.

features.title: Online & Mobile Banking
features.desc: Manage payroll, transfers, and invoicing from anywhere.

features.title: Free ACH Payments
features.desc: Send and receive ACH payments at no additional cost.

features.title: QuickBooks Integration
features.desc: Connect directly to QuickBooks, Xero, and other accounting tools.

features.title: Employee Cards
features.desc: Issue additional debit cards for employees with spending controls.

features.title: Fraud Protection
features.desc: Positive pay, dual authorization, and real-time alerts.

essential-checking.cta_desc: Apply online in minutes. No appointment needed.

line-of-credit.title: Business Line of Credit
line-of-credit.subtitle: Flexible revolving credit from $10,000 to $250,000. Draw funds when you need them, pay interest only on what you use. Ideal for managing cash flow gaps.

features.title: Pay Only What You Use
features.desc: Interest only on your outstanding balance. No penalty for early repayment.

features.title: Quick Access
features.desc: Draw funds online, by phone, or write a check. Funds available same day.

features.title: Revolving Credit
features.desc: As you repay, your available credit replenishes. No need to reapply.

features.title: Cash Flow Management
features.desc: Bridge seasonal gaps, cover payroll, or fund inventory purchases.

features.title: Online Management
features.desc: Draw funds, make payments, and track balances from the dashboard.

features.title: No Collateral Required
features.desc: Unsecured lines up to $100K. Secured options available for larger lines.

line-of-credit.cta_desc: Apply online. Most businesses get a decision within 24 hours.

payments.title: Business Payment Solutions
payments.subtitle: Accept payments in-store and online, send invoices, and manage your cash flow with integrated payment processing tools.

features.title: Next-Day Deposits
features.desc: Funds arrive in your Meridian account the next business day.

features.title: PCI Compliant
features.desc: Fully PCI-compliant processing protects your customers' card data.

features.title: Sales Dashboard
features.desc: Track transactions, refunds, and settlements in real time from one dashboard.

features.title: POS Systems
features.desc: Full point-of-sale with inventory management, tips, and employee tracking.

features.title: No Monthly Minimums
features.desc: No processing minimums or long-term contracts. Pay only when you sell.

features.title: Recurring Billing
features.desc: Set up subscription payments and automatic billing for repeat customers.

payments.cta_desc: No monthly fee. No long-term contract. Get set up in days.

performance-checking.title: Business Performance Checking
performance-checking.subtitle: Full-featured checking for growing businesses. Unlimited transactions, higher cash deposit limits, and earnings credit to offset fees.

features.title: Unlimited Transactions
features.desc: No per-transaction fees, no matter how much your business grows.

features.title: Earnings Credit
features.desc: Earn credits on your balance to offset monthly service charges and fees.

features.title: Free Wire Transfers
features.desc: 10 free domestic wires per month. International wires at reduced rates.

features.title: Dedicated Advisor
features.desc: A dedicated business banker to help manage your accounts and plan ahead.

features.title: Advanced Reporting
features.desc: Custom reports, cash flow analysis, and transaction categorization.

features.title: Positive Pay
features.desc: Prevent check fraud with automated verification of every check presented.

performance-checking.cta_desc: Unlimited transactions and dedicated support for growing businesses.

term-loans.title: Business Term Loans & SBA Lending
term-loans.subtitle: Fixed-rate term loans from $25,000 to $5 million. SBA 7(a) and 504 loans with longer terms and lower down payments for qualifying businesses.

features.title: SBA Preferred Lender
features.desc: Faster processing and in-house approval authority for SBA loans.

features.title: Dedicated Loan Officer
features.desc: Work with a single point of contact from application through funding.

features.title: Competitive Rates
features.desc: Fixed and variable rate options to match your business needs.

features.title: Flexible Terms
features.desc: 1 to 25 year terms. Match repayment to the useful life of what you're financing.

features.title: Digital Application
features.desc: Apply online, upload documents, and track your loan status digitally.

features.title: Commercial Real Estate
features.desc: Finance owner-occupied properties with SBA 504 loans up to $5.5M.

term-loans.cta_desc: Apply online or schedule a consultation with a lending specialist.

travel-rewards-card.title: Business Travel Rewards Visa Signature®
travel-rewards-card.subtitle: Earn 3X points on travel and dining, 1.5X on everything else. Priority Pass lounge access and comprehensive travel insurance.

features.title: No Foreign Transaction Fees
features.desc: Your team can travel internationally without added card fees.

features.title: Travel Insurance
features.desc: Trip cancellation, baggage delay, and travel accident coverage for all cardholders.

features.title: Auto Rental Insurance
features.desc: Primary rental car coverage when employees pay with the card.

features.title: Employee Cards
features.desc: Issue cards to traveling employees. All points accrue to the business account.

features.title: Expense Reporting
features.desc: Categorized statements and year-end summaries for easy bookkeeping.

features.title: Flexible Redemption
features.desc: Redeem for travel, statement credits, gift cards, or cash back.
